ideas_backlog.title: Bio-Digital VRAM Monitor
ideas_backlog.description: Glassmorphic VRAM gauge with gradient fill showing GTX 1650 Ti utilization. Complements the RAM Watchdog at 70% threshold. Animated fill on hover.
